title: SQL: timestamp comparisons do not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE datetest (low DATETIME NOT NULL, high DATETIME NOT NULL, description TEXT);
SELECT * FROM datetest WHERE datetime('now') > COALESCE(low, '2000-01-01 00:00:00') AND datetime('now') < high;
SELECT * FROM datetest WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM datetest d2 WHERE d2.low < datetime('now') AND d2.high > datetime('now'));
key_bug_features: Timestamp comparisons in SQL queries fail to function
